name: Isteriku Itu Kakakku
overview:
"We're siblings..."

They were drawn to each other by fate, only to discover she was his sister.She was the woman he loved but also his sister by blood.When love and family ties become entangled, how can they face such a forbidden bond?Can love still survive under the name of family?
